creator: ino-qc@spotteswoode.de.eu.org
text:
> Andrey V. Elsukov:

> I have similar PR for CURRENT:
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=kern/89102

i queried the PR database several times using "umount" as the criteria
without any results.  obviously the db was inaccessible at the time, and
my PR hasn't shown up for a while.

indeed, your PR is very similar to mine and is more comprehensive.  if
it turns out that both have a common cause, i won't object if mine is
closed in favour of yours.

now that the PR-db is up again, i noticed there are quite a number of
related PRs.

regards, clemens
